result.post_video_description: A series of scenes from a wedding featuring Indra and Ghina in traditional attire, including green and gold outfits adorned with floral garlands. Joko Widodo and Heru Purnomo, dressed in ornate batik shirts and black caps, are seen smiling and interacting with guests. The setting includes a decorated venue with red carpets, floral arrangements, and a crowd of attendees in formal clothing. Text overlays read "di desa di Desa Kragan" and "ini mantennnya" in some frames, indicating the location and focus on the bride and groom. The video captures moments of the couple walking together, guests greeting each other, and the couple posing for photos in an elegant indoor space with white curtains and floral decor.

result.text:
Senang sekali hari Minggu ini bisa hadir di pernikahan Indra & Ghina.
Terima kasih kepada Paman saya, Pak Heru Purnomo dan Ibu sudah mengundang kami untuk berbagi kebahagiaan di hari istimewa ini.

Semoga kalian berdua membangun rumah tangga yang penuh kasih, saling menguatkan, dan selalu diberkahi kebahagiaan. 

Selamat menempuh hidup baru, Indra & Ghina.
